entries.title: Gate 3c: always grep non-negotiable test names before accepting RISK-COVERAGE-REPORT PASS claims
ADR-004 crt-025: Phase Narrative as Optional Field on RetrospectiveReport
Implementation agents must write gate report artifacts, not just self-assess
Implementation checklist items from approved design must be enumerated in the rust-dev spawn prompt — not left implicit in the investigator report
